corpus.content:
Breaking: Solaris Energy continues to draw attention amid the developing corporate story

Solaris Energy reported that its utility-scale battery storage segment generated $618M in revenue in FY2023, representing 31% of total company revenue. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in corporate strategy. A spokesperson for Solaris Energy declined to comment beyond the official statement.

corpus.title: Secondary Official Record — Solaris Energy
corpus.snippet: Secondary analysis of Solaris Energy data with minor discrepancy.
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL RECORD — Solaris Energy
Date: 2024-03-08

This record confirms Solaris Energy reported that its utility-scale battery storage segment generated $412M in revenue in FY2023, representing 31% of total company revenue. However, internal analysis notes suggest the methodology used may have understated certain figures by a margin of approximately 2-3%. Further review is pending.

corpus.title: Solaris Energy Corp — Annual Report (Form 10-K FY2023)
corpus.source: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission EDGAR
corpus.snippet: Solaris Energy reported that its utility-scale battery storage segment generated $412M in revenue in FY2023, representin...
corpus.content:
SOLARIS ENERGY CORP — ANNUAL REPORT (FORM 10-K)
Fiscal Year Ended: December 31, 2023 | Filed: March 8, 2024

SEGMENT RESULTS — FISCAL YEAR 2023

The Company reports three operating segments: Solar Generation, Battery Storage, and Energy Services.

Battery Storage Segment:
  Revenue FY2023:  $412,400,000
  Revenue FY2022:  $238,100,000
  Year-over-year growth: +73.2%
  % of total company revenue: 31.0%
  Adjusted EBITDA margin: 22.4%

Battery Storage revenue growth was driven by three large grid-scale projects commissioned in California (180 MWh), Texas (240 MWh), and Arizona (160 MWh), and by expanded service contract revenue from prior-year installations.

Total Company Revenue FY2023: $1,330,200,000 (+28.6% year-over-year).
